details: log-communication.sh had empty catch(e){} and used process.argv[1] for JSON — both ISS-4/ISS-5 missed. Fixed to use stdin and stderr logging.
Added src/metrics.ts with HiveMetrics tracking, src/index.ts barrel export, 12 new tests. Coverage maintained at 100%.
Added 4 consistency tests: no WI-NNNN refs, Write tool presence, version sync, no empty catches.
